name: Creamy Scalloped Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of Mushroom Soup (10 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and thinly slice the potatoes.
2. Toss the potato slices in 1 cup water and 1/2 teaspoon cream of tartar.
3. Drain the potato slices.
4. Place half of the drained potato slices in a greased Crock-Pot.
5. Top with half of the onion slices, flour, salt, and pepper.
6. Add the remaining potato slices and onions.
7. Sprinkle with the remaining flour.
8. Add butter and undiluted soup.
9. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 9 hours (High: 3 to 4 hours).
10. Add cheese slices 30 minutes before serving.
